race.comment: The most interesting of maidens with a host of improvers and a Japanese import. PANDA'S SPECTRUM (12) was good over 1450m on debut then better over a mile latest, beaten just a neck in a richer maiden at Cranbourne. Extra trip is a plus and looks tough to beat. EISMOND (10) is the most interesting runner of the day being a former Japanese 14-start maiden. Has nine placings to her name and the trip suits. Placed 2/2 when fresh and best figure more than measures up. May well be too good for these. TENNESSEETWOPIECE (8) started big odds at debut over a mile and was a close-up fourth. Has upside and extra trip a plus. RAINEY (14) was good on debut over a mile finishing fifth and looks suited by the extra trip. Can only be improved. WOOLLEN (13) just missed two back then was a fair fourth latest. Hard to beat on best.
